comment: CSS module manifest — defines always-load vs optional modules

optional.course: Course note components (geom-box, alg-box, app-box, conn-card)
optional.timeline: Timeline, VS comparison — historical narrative pages
optional.media: Bilibili, YouTube, Google Slides embeds — pages with video embeds
optional.document-page: PDF.js doc-page shortcode — pages with document previews
optional.mermaid: Mermaid diagram rendering — pages with flowcharts
